channel.title: Projects on Home
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Home

item.title: Automated detection of diabetic retinopathy
item.description: Used Keras library of preprocessing and basic morphological techniques for feature extraction. Trained a synergic deep learning model (VGG16 and VGG19 integrated stacking) to achieve an accuracy of 99%.

item.title: Automated Low-Risk Investment System
item.description: The idea is to study the overall spending earning analysis using Open Banking API and to automate Savings and Low-Risk Investment opportunities to counter factors like inflation, taxes and loan intrests. Using Machine Learning and Data Analysis, the application will monitor multiple stocks and suggest a Low-Risk Investment based on the spending earning analysis of the user. This will help people personalize their spending, saving and investment goals. Additional Features - Personal finance management, Subscription management, Personalised Investment opportunities other than Stocks.

item.title: Crowdfund on Ethereum blockchain
item.description: Developed CrowdFund - an innovative application built using Solidity, React.js, Next.js, and Bootstrap. It differs from existing applications because unlike other applications transactions are completed after the approval of all contributors in a particular campaign.

item.title: AAA Tech Services
item.description: aaatech.in AAA tech was an entrepreneurship project. It was a covid-19 initiative to provide small businesses with all technical solutions, including websites, applications, software, and video ads. Developed 4 freelance projects during this period.
